parameters.query: SELECT l.id AS launch_id, l.user_id, l.launch_name, l.product_name, l.competitor_names, l.target_launch_date, l.readiness_score, l.readiness_breakdown, l.initial_messaging, l.initial_positioning FROM launch.launches l WHERE l.phase IN ('pre_launch', 'planning') AND l.target_launch_date = CURRENT_DATE;
SELECT b.brief_type, b.title, b.content_md, b.brief_date, b.signal_count FROM launch.briefs b WHERE b.launch_id = '{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid ORDER BY b.brief_date DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT rc.check_date, rc.score, rc.risk_factors, rc.opportunities FROM launch.readiness_checks rc WHERE rc.launch_id = '{{ $('Get Launch-Day Launches').item.json.launch_id }}'::uuid ORDER BY rc.check_date DESC LIMIT 7;

INSERT INTO launch.briefs (launch_id, brief_type, brief_date, title, content_json, content_md, signal_count, days_to_launch) VALUES ('{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid, 'packet', CURRENT_DATE, '{{ $json.packet_title }}', '{{ $json.packet_json }}'::jsonb, '{{ $json.packet_md.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', {{ $json.total_signals }}, 0);
UPDATE launch.launches SET phase = 'post_launch', actual_launch_date = CURRENT_DATE, updated_at = now() WHERE id = '{{ $json.launch_id }}'::uuid;
